items.title: Berkshire Could See $3 Billion Hit to Interest Income If Fed Slashes Rates in Next Year
items.description: The prospect of lower short rates may be weighing on Berkshire stock, which continues to languish as the S&P 500 hits new highs.

items.title: With no DOJ breakup, Alphabet becomes a $3 trillion company
items.description: Investors continue to reward Alphabet's stock after a judge declined to break up Google earlier this month.

items.title: iPhone 17 Pre-Orders Run Hot Despite Air Delay
items.description: Wedbush and Kuo upbeat, China snag seen as temporary

items.title: Stocks Rally as Bond Yields Fall Before FOMC Meeting
items.description: The S&P 500 Index ($SPX ) (SPY ) on Monday closed up +0.47%, the Dow Jones Industrials Index ($DOWI ) (DIA ) closed up +0.11%, and the Nasdaq 100 Index ($IUXX ) (QQQ ) closed up +0.84%. September E-mini S&P futures (ESU25 ) rose +0.43%, and September E-mini Nasdaq futures...

items.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Up As Buffett Stock Tests Entry; Tesla Jumps On Musk Move (Live Coverage)
items.description: The Dow was firm and the Nasdaq gained. Tesla rose on the stock market today after an Elon Musk move. A Warren Buffett stock tested an entry.
